name: Raymond Ave Crips, 120th Street
description: Street Crips are a predominately African-American street gang located in the unincorporated area of Los Angeles County called Athens just west of the Los Angeles City border in California. Specifically they are between Normandie (west) and Vermont (east) Avenues from 120th Street (north) to El Segundo Blvd (south). Members of this set will often claim Los Angeles, and there is some presence of the Raymond Crips east of Los Angeles border of Vermont Ave.

sources.title: Raymond Ave Crips, 120th Street in West Athens Unincorporated Los Angeles County — StreetGangs
